sanskrit:
ये त्वेतदभ्यसूयन्तो नानुतिष्ठन्ति मे मतम्‌।
सर्वज्ञानविमूढांस्तान्विद्धि नष्टानचेतसः॥
transliteration:
ye tv etad abhyasūyanto nānutiṣṭhanti me matam |
sarva-jñāna-vimūḍhāṃs tān viddhi naṣṭān acetasaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Those who, out of envy, do not follow this teaching of Mine, know them to be deluded in all knowledge, ruined and devoid of awareness.
contextual_meaning: Krishna warns that wilful rejection of integrated action (dharma performed without attachment) due to egoic rivalry or cynicism fragments the psyche, producing a trance of ignorance that erodes discernment and self-coherence.
psychological_state: A rigid, superiority-defended stance that masks an inner fear of insignificance; the person splits off from growth-promoting feedback and enters a self-confirming loop of ignorance.
trigger_scenario: A talented team-member refuses to follow the agreed protocol, mocking it as 'soft' or 'irrational', then watches the project—and their own reputation—unravel.
anchor_text: Rejecting wisdom out of envy scatters the mind and ruins clarity.
